metadata.title: Markdown to Slack Message
metadata.description: Markdown to Slack Message Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: warn
ast.source: marked(): sanitize and sanitizer parameters are deprecated since version 0.7.0, should not be used and will be removed in the future. Read more here: https://marked.js.org/#/USING_ADVANCED.md#options
ast.target: marked(): sanitize 和 sanitizer 参数自 0.7.0 版本起已弃用，不应使用，并将在未来移除。在此处阅读更多信息：https://marked.js.org/#/USING_ADVANCED.md#options

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将 Markdown 转换为 Slack 消息
